Wednesday, 18 February 2026
VRPulseTheInkU

Prompt

Single-panel comic illustration (comic strip look), clean black outlines, warm colors, soft watercolor-like digital shading, centered composition. Normal adult proportions. NOT chibi, NOT kawaii, NOT emoji. Show a simple scene with minimal props; not a studio portrait headshot. Family-friendly. NO text, NO letters, NO numbers, NO logos, NO watermark. Concept: Ahre Die Ähren auf dem Feld waren schon schwer und hingen leicht nach unten.

GPT Image-1.5
1536×1024
Low
Seed:900623
